description: The ConvexHullBrushTool component is a tool tip used to draw convex hulls.

fields.MinHullPointDistance: The minimum distance between points to be wrapped by a convex hull mesh.
fields.FlatShading: Whether the Convex Hull Mesh should be flat shaded.
fields.PointSpread: how far apart to spread the convex hull points
fields.MaterialPreviews: A list of mesh renderers being used to preview materials for the tool
fields._currentHull: The current convex hull this brush is modifying via drawing.

methods.ChangeSize: Handles changing the size of the brush of a brush tool.
